{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Eithan's green gauntlet
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] has a green gauntlet.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
